info.title: HIV.B HTS visit API
info.description: This tab describes the data that are collected during the HIV Testing services visit workflow (HIV.B)

get.summary: JSON Schema definition for the Logical Model StructureDefinition-HIVBHTSvisit
get.description: This endpoint serves the JSON Schema definition for the Logical Model StructureDefinition-HIVBHTSvisit.

StructureDefinition-HIVBHTSvisit.title: HIV.B HTS visit
StructureDefinition-HIVBHTSvisit.description: This tab describes the data that are collected during the HIV Testing services visit workflow (HIV.B)

resourceType.description: Resource type identifier for HIVBHTSvisit logical model

@context.description: JSON-LD context for this logical model with ValueSet vocabularies

anyOf.description: URI reference to external JSON-LD context

@type.description: JSON-LD type identifier for HIVBHTSvisit logical model

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.B.DE1

reasonForVisit.description: Reason for HIV testing services visit

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.B.DE5

referredThroughPartnerServices.description: Client reported coming to the facility after receiving a provider-assisted referral or patient referral from a contact or partner

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.B.DE8

typeOfContactOrPartnerForPartnerServices.description: Client's relationship to the person that referred the client for partner services or family services

contactWithAndSuspectedExposureToHiv.description: When the client is reported to have had suspected exposure to HIV

dateTimeOfSuspectedExposureToHiv.description: Date and time when the client had suspected exposure to HIV

testingEntryPoint.description: Whether testing is happening in the community or at a facility

entryPointForCommunityLevelTesting.description: Specific point in the community where testing is happening

entryPointForFacilityLevelTesting.description: Specific point where testing is happening at a facility

gestationalAge.description: Gestational age in weeks and/or days depending on the source of gestational age

expectedDateOfDeliveryEdd.description: Expected date of delivery based on gestational age

breastfeeding.description: Infant is being breastfed by mother

partnerHivStatusReported.description: The HIV status of the client's partner.

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.B.DE37

partnerIsFromAKeyPopulation.description: Client's partner is a member of a key population, that has an increased risk of HIV

hasUsedAnHivSelfTestBeforeReported.description: The client reported having used an HIV self-test before

hivSelfTestResult.description: Results from the reported HIV self-test

dateOfHivSelfTest.description: Date when the HIV self-test was conducted

keyPopulationMember.description: Client is a member of a key population that has an increased risk of HIV

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.B.DE50

keyPopulationMemberType.description: The type of key population that the client is included in

adolescentGirl.description: Calculated field based on age and gender, if client is 10 years or older and under 20 years old

youngWoman.description: Calculated field based on age and gender, if client is 20 years or older and under 25 years old

orphanOrVulnerableChild.description: Client considered an orphan or vulnerable child

informedOfHivTestResult.description: Client has been informed of their HIV test result

dateHivTestResultsReturned.description: Date HIV test result returned to client

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.B.DE61

hivExposureType.description: Ways in which the client was exposed to HIV

dateInformedOfHivPositiveDiagnosis.description: The date on which the client was diagnosed with HIV

hivDiagnosingFacility.description: The facility where the client received an HIV-positive diagnosis

dateOfFirstPositiveTestIndicativeOfHivDi.description: Earliest date of HIV diagnosis determined according to the national HIV testing algorithm

hivDiagnosisDate.description: Date diagnosis was returned to client

artStartDate.description: The date on which the client started or restarted antiretroviral therapy (ART)

ageAtDiagnosis.description: The client's age (in years) when given an HIV diagnosis

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.B.DE74

typeOfContactElicited.description: Client's relationship to the contact identified for voluntary partner services or family services

hivTestOrdered.description: An HIV test of the client was ordered by the provider

hivTestConducted.description: An HIV test was performed on the client during the visit

dateHivTestSent.description: Date HIV specimen was sent to lab

assayNumberInTestingStrategy.description: The number of the assay (test kit) in the HIV testing strategy

testResultOfHivAssay1.description: The result of the first HIV assay in the testing strategy

testResultOfHivAssay2.description: The result of the second HIV assay in the testing strategy

testResultOfHivAssay3.description: The result of the third HIV assay in the testing strategy

testResultOfHivAssay1Repeated.description: The result of the repeated first HIV assay in the testing strategy

hivTestResult.description: The result from HIV testing after applying the testing algorithm

hivStatus.description: HIV status reported after applying the national HIV testing algorithm. No single HIV test can provide an HIV-positive diagnosis.

datePositiveHivTestConfirmed.description: Date patient received positive HIV test confirmation (with written documentation)

siteWherePositiveHivTestConfirmed.description: Name or identifier of health facility where HIV test was confirmed

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.B.DE121

probableRouteOfTransmission.description: Probable route(s) of transmission of HIV to client

partnerHivTestConducted.description: If the client does not know the HIV status of the client's partner(s), offer to test and add results here

partnerHivTestOrdered.description: An HIV test for the client's partner has been ordered

partnerHivTestDate.description: Date of client's partner's HIV test

partnerHivTestResult.description: The HIV test result of the client's partner

partnerHivStatusConfirmed.description: The HIV status of a sexual or drug-injecting partner of the client, based on a confirmed test result

partnerOnArt.description: Partner of the client is on ART

partnerVirallySuppressedOnArt.description: ART and virally suppression status of a partner of the client

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.B.DE142

counsellingProvided.description: Whether counselling was provided to a client during the visit

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.B.DE149

preventionServicesOfferedAndReferrals.description: Offer or refer to prevention services

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.B.DE158

sexualAndReproductiveHealthIntegratedSer.description: Offer or refer to sexual and reproductive health services

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.B.DE165

offerOtherClinicalServices.description: Other clinical services offered or referrals given to the client

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.B.DE172

otherSupportServices.description: Offer or refer for other support services

clinicalEnquiryForIntimatePartnerViolenc.description: Whether a clinical enquiry for intimate partner violence was conducted

intimatePartnerViolenceEnquiryResults.description: Result of medical inquiry for intimate partner violence

otherIpvResultSpecify.description: Other intimate partner violence (IPV) result not described above (specify)

offeredVoluntaryPartnerServices.description: Whether the client was offered voluntary partner services or family services

countOfContactsOrPartnersGivenForSocialN.description: The quantity of contacts or partners given by a client that accepts social network-based/partner services for follow-up

offeredSocialNetworkBasedPartnerServices.description: Whether the client was offered social network-based partner services

acceptedSocialNetworkBasedPartnerService.description: Whether the client accepted social network-based partner services

contactFirstNameToOfferSocialNetworkBase.description: First name of each contact given by the client to offer social network-based/partner services

contactLastNameToOfferSocialNetworkBased.description: Last or family name of each contact given by the client to offer social network-based/partner services

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.B.DE191

typeOfFollowUpAppointment.description: Type of follow-up appointment for testing services

otherReasonForTheFollowUpAppointmentSpec.description: Other reason for the follow-up appointment (specify)

dateTimeOfFollowUpAppointment.description: Date the patient is to return for monitoring, re-supply or any other reason

recommendedFollowUpDate.description: Date when follow-up is recommended based on follow up requirements

vmmcProcedure.description: Whether a voluntary medical male circumcision procedure was performed

vmmcProcedureDate.description: Date on which a voluntary medical male circumcision procedure was performed

adverseEventReportedFromAVmmc.description: Whether an adverse event was reported associated with a voluntary medical male circumcision (VMMC) procedure

seriousAdverseEvent.description: Complications from voluntary medical male circumcision (VMMC) procedure resulted in death or hospitalization within 30 days of the procedure or permanent disability

adverseEventSeverity.description: Severity of the adverse event associated with voluntary medical male circumcision (VMMC) procedure

timingOfAdverseEvent.description: When the adverse event associated with VMMC procedure occurred

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.B.DE207

typeOfAdverseVmmcEvent.description: Type of adverse event associated with voluntary medical male circumcision (VMMC) procedure

otherTypeOfAdverseVmmcEvent.description: Client experienced other adverse VMMC event (specify)

hivRetestPriorToStartingArtConducted.description: HIV retest prior to starting ART conducted

atElevatedRiskForHivAcquisition.description: Client is at elevated risk for HIV acquisition

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.B.DE226

syndromeStiDiagnosed.description: Syndrome or STI for which client is diagnosed

anyStiSyndromeDiagnosed.description: Was the client diagnosed with any of the five STI syndromes during this visit?

dateOfStiTest.description: Date on which the STI test was conducted

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.B.DE237

stiTestedFor.description: STI for which the client was tested

syphilisTreatmentStartDate.description: Date of initiation of syphilis treatment

gonorrhoeaTreatmentStartDate.description: Date of initiation of Gonorrhoea treatment

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.B.DE261

typeOfSpecimen.description: Type of specimen to be collected

otherTypeOfSpecimenSpecify.description: Other specimen type to be collected (specify)

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.B.DE269

syphilisTestType.description: Type of diagnostic test used for syphilis (treponema pallidum)

neisseriaGonorrhoeaeTestType.description: Type of diagnostic test used for Neisseria gonorrhoeae

pocTestForNeisseriaGonorrhoeaeSpecify.description: Point-of-care (POC) test used for Neisseria gonorrhoeae (specify)

chlamydiaTrachomatisTestType.description: Type of diagnostic test used for Chlamydia trachomatis

otherTestForChlamydiaSpecify.description: Other type of test used for Chlaymdia (specify)

trichomonasVaginalisTestType.description: Type of diagnostic test used for Trichomonas vaginalis

herpesSimplexVirusHsvTestType.description: Type of diagnostic test used for herpes simplex virus (HSV)

otherHerpesSimplexVirusHsvTestType.description: Other type of test used for Herpes simplex virus (HSV) test (specify)

mycoplasmaGenitaliumTestType.description: Type of diagnostic test used for Mycoplasma genitalium

otherMycoplasmaGenitaliumTestType.description: Other type of test used for Mycoplasma genitalium test (specify)

testTypeForOtherStiTestedForSpecify.description: Test type used for the other specified STI

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.B.DE317

confirmatorySyphilisTestType.description: Type of test ued for confirmatory syphilis test

otherConfirmatorySyphilisTestType.description: Other test used for confirmatory syphilis test (specify)

confirmatoryTestTypeForOtherStiSpecify.description: Confirmatory test type for other STI

dateStiTreatmentPrescribed.description: Date STI treatment was prescribed to the client

dateStiTreatmentDispensed.description: Date STI treatment dispensed to the client

stiTreatmentDispensedSpecify.description: STI treatment dispensed to the client
